item.title: Babysitter From Hell: "She Fell from a Slide!"
item.description: Such a gorgeous, wonderful little darling of a child. My heart breaks for the family... What are your thoughts? Have you seen Kirsten's full interrogation footage?

media:content.media:title: Babysitter From Hell: "She Fell from a Slide!"
media:content.media:description: Such a gorgeous, wonderful little darling of a child. My heart breaks for the family... What are your thoughts? Have you seen Kirsten's full interrogation footage?

item.title: She Uploaded a Dance Video AFTER Losing Her Daughter!
item.description:
In August 2021, Birmingham Crown Court sentenced Nicola Priest to 15 years in prison for manslaughter and child cruelty. Her former boyfriend, Callum Redfern, received a 14-year sentence. Prosecutors said Kaylee-Jayde suffered a severe assault that caused fatal chest and abdominal injuries. Evidence presented at trial included previous injuries and abusive messages exchanged before the child's death.
The case also attracted attention because Priest posted TikTok videos after her daughter's death, including videos that appeared to mourn or reference the child, which were discussed during the trial.

media:content.media:title: She Uploaded a Dance Video AFTER Losing Her Daughter!
media:content.media:description:
In August 2021, Birmingham Crown Court sentenced Nicola Priest to 15 years in prison for manslaughter and child cruelty. Her former boyfriend, Callum Redfern, received a 14-year sentence. Prosecutors said Kaylee-Jayde suffered a severe assault that caused fatal chest and abdominal injuries. Evidence presented at trial included previous injuries and abusive messages exchanged before the child's death.
The case also attracted attention because Priest posted TikTok videos after her daughter's death, including videos that appeared to mourn or reference the child, which were discussed during the trial.
